if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb'

select.if:
select * from (select ROW_NUMBER() over (order by modify_time desc) as tempId, * from ( select curCom.id, curCom.code, curCom.full_name as fullName, curCom.short_name as shortName, curCom.description, curCom.full_path as fullPath, curCom.lay_no as layNo, curCom.sort, curCom.valid, curCom.modify_time, parentCom.code as parentCode from org_company curCom left join org_company parentCom on curCom.parent_id = parentCom.id
where curCom.modify_time > #{modifyTime} )as a )as a
where curCom.valid =1 )as a )as a
where a.tempId between #{sqlserverOffset} and #{pointer}

if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb' or dbType == 'sqlserver'
